sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Batch clicks to move magenta square towards blue circle
# Current center: (51, 12)
# Path: (49, 14), (47, 16), (45, 18), (43, 20), (41, 22), (39, 24), (37, 26), (35, 28), (33, 30), (31, 32), (29, 34), (27, 36), (25, 38), (23, 40), (21, 42), (19, 44), (17, 46)
path = [(49, 14), (47, 16), (45, 18), (43, 20), (41, 22), (39, 24), (37, 26), (35, 28), (33, 30), (31, 32), (29, 34), (27, 36), (25, 38), (23, 40), (21, 42), (19, 44), (17, 46)]

# Execute all clicks in batch
actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in path]
result = action(actions)

# Check final state
after = current_frame.segmentation
after_p = []
for n in after['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]), max([p[0] for p in b]), min([p[1] for p in b]), max([p[1] for p in b]))
        after_p.append(r)
print(f"Magenta after: {after_p}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
